data.content: The benchmarks only ran on .NET 10 — I need to add explicit job attributes so BenchmarkDotNet runs on both runtimes. Let me fix that.
data.reasoningText:
The benchmarks only ran on a single runtime (.NET 10.0) because BenchmarkDotNet needs multi-targeting configured properly. The project targets both `net9.0` and `net10.0`, but when we run with `--framework net10.0`, BenchmarkDotNet only runs on the runtime it was launched with unless we explicitly configure it to use multiple runtimes via `[SimpleJob]` attributes.

I need to modify the benchmark to use `[SimpleJob(RuntimeMoniker.Net90)]` and `[SimpleJob(RuntimeMoniker.Net100)]` attributes so BenchmarkDotNet spawns benchmark processes on both runtimes.
